info.title: Turjuman API
info.description:
Deterministic REST API for the Turjuman developer CLI and CI sync.

**Base URL:** your own deployment's `ApiUrl` (the `cdk deploy` stack output); replace the server below with it.

**Auth:** every `/v1/projects` route requires `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`. The meta endpoints (`GET /`, `GET /v1/formats`, `GET /v1/openapi.json`) and the first-owner `POST /v1/bootstrap` are public (no auth).

servers.description: Your deployed Turjuman API URL (the ApiUrl from `cdk deploy`)

secret.description: The one-time API key secret — shown once, store it now.

requestId.description: Per-request correlation id, echoed in the X-Request-Id header.

baseLocale.description: Source locale every key is authored in, e.g. "en".

contextRevision.description: Monotonic counter bumped on any scoped context write (context-staleness).

requireHumanAccept.description: When true, only a human (not a run) may accept a proposed translation.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor; pass back as `cursor` for the next page.

description.description: Context for translators and the connected LLM.

plural.description: When true, values are ICU plural messages.

state.description: "active" when present in the latest source import; "deprecated" when absent but retained.

noTranslate.description: Keep the whole key verbatim across locales (brand names, codes).

sourceRevision.description: Revision token of the base value; bumps on a base edit and stales dependents.

lastSeenAt.description: ISO timestamp of the last import that created, updated, or reactivated this key.

value.description: ICU MessageFormat string (plain string for simple values).

head.description: Seq of the current accepted version (the branch-head / CAS token).

sourceRef.description: The base revision this value was written against; derives staleness.

origin.description: How the current `value` was produced. Absent when unknown.

findings.description: Stable-sorted by locale, namespace, keyName, checkId.

byLocale.description: The same findings grouped by target locale.

localeCode.description: The target locale the finding is about.

value.description: A short snippet of the offending value.

checks.description: Per-check overrides keyed by check id.

ignore.description: Findings matching any of these rules are dropped from the report.

get.description: Returns the service name and version. Public — no auth required.
The locale file formats the CLI can read/write. Public — no auth required.

post.description: Create the very first OWNER (in the default org) and return its one-time API key. Public — no auth required — but only while the org has no users: once an owner exists it returns 409. This is the only way to obtain the first key; mint further keys through the API/MCP.

201.description: The created owner and its one-time API key

get.description: Projects the authenticated caller can access.

post.summary: Add a target locale to a project

get.description: List a project's keys; paginate with limit + cursor.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from a previous page

post.summary: Create/update keys and base-locale values (CLI push)

get.description: All translations for a locale; paginate with limit + cursor.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from a previous page

get.summary: Export a delivery bundle for a locale
get.description: Accepted values by default; pass slot=working to ship drafts. Paginate with limit + cursor.

parameters.name: slot
parameters.description: working = ship drafts instead of accepted

parameters.name: fallback
parameters.description: omit = drop keys with no value instead of source fallback

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from a previous page

post.summary: Bulk-write translation values for a locale (CLI push)
Run advisory QA checks on a project's translations

200.description: QA report (findings grouped by locale + rollup counts)
